keephist.purpose: Flag indicating keephist for the version history annotation record.

protect.purpose: Flag indicating protect for the version history annotation record.

dbo.vhist_annaccess.summary: Version history records for annotation access row.
safeReportingNotes: Use version history annotation access row records for read-only reporting after reviewing whether values include document content, metadata values, or user-entered data.

sid.purpose: Security identifier for the trustee, user, group, or account.

dbo.vhist_annpoint.summary: Version history records for annotation point.
safeReportingNotes: Use version history annotation point records for read-only reporting after reviewing whether values include document content, metadata values, or user-entered data.

x.purpose: X coordinate for the annotation point.

y.purpose: Y coordinate for the annotation point.

dbo.vhist_annrect.summary: Version history records for annotation rectangle.
safeReportingNotes: Use version history annotation rectangle records for read-only reporting after reviewing whether values include document content, metadata values, or user-entered data.

x1.purpose: First X coordinate for the annotation rectangle.

y1.purpose: First Y coordinate for the annotation rectangle.

x2.purpose: Second X coordinate for the annotation rectangle.

y2.purpose: Second Y coordinate for the annotation rectangle.

dbo.vhist_changes.summary: Version history records for change summary.
safeReportingNotes: Use version history change summary records for read-only Repository metadata reporting.

pages_added.purpose: Pages Added for the version history change summary record.

pages_deleted.purpose: Flag indicating pages deleted for the version history change summary record.

pages_img_changed.purpose: Pages Image Changed for the version history change summary record.

pages_txt_changed.purpose: Pages Txt Changed for the version history change summary record.

props_added.purpose: Fields Added for the version history change summary record.

props_deleted.purpose: Flag indicating fields deleted for the version history change summary record.

props_changed.purpose: Fields Changed for the version history change summary record.

anns_added.purpose: Anns Added for the version history change summary record.

anns_deleted.purpose: Flag indicating anns deleted for the version history change summary record.

anns_changed.purpose: Anns Changed for the version history change summary record.

geo_added.purpose: Geolocation Added stored for the version history change summary record; review contents before reporting.

geo_deleted.purpose: Flag indicating geolocation deleted for the version history change summary record.

geo_changed.purpose: Geolocation Changed stored for the version history change summary record; review contents before reporting.

dbo.vhist_doc.summary: Version history records for document page.
safeReportingNotes: Use version history document page records for read-only reporting after reviewing whether values include document content, metadata values, or user-entered data.

storeid.purpose: Storage object identifier within the repository volume.

page_flags.purpose: Permission or bit flag value for page flags on the version history document page record.

native_language.purpose: Native Language for the version history document page record.

dbo.vhist_geo.summary: Version history records for geolocation row.
safeReportingNotes: Use version history geolocation row records for read-only Repository metadata reporting.

geo.purpose: Geolocation stored for the version history geolocation row record; review contents before reporting.

geotext.purpose: Geotext for the version history geolocation row record.

dbo.vhist_propval.summary: Version history records for field value.
safeReportingNotes: Use version history field value records for read-only reporting after reviewing whether values include document content, metadata values, or user-entered data.

prop_pos.purpose: Numeric value for field pos on the version history field value record.

status.purpose: Status for the version history field value record.

prop_group_id.purpose: Field Group identifier for the version history field value record.

dbo.vhist_toc.summary: Version history records for repository entry.
safeReportingNotes: Use version history repository entry records for read-only reporting after reviewing whether values include document content, metadata values, or user-entered data.

checked_in.purpose: Timestamp when the version was checked in.

etag.purpose: ETag for the version history repository entry record.

who.purpose: Trustee or account associated with the action.

toc_flags.purpose: Permission or bit flag value for repository entry flags on the version history repository entry record.

toc_comment.purpose: Repository Entry Comment for the version history repository entry record.

edoc_storeid.purpose: Storage object identifier for the electronic document content.

edoc_lastmod.purpose: Timestamp when the electronic document content was last changed.

native_language.purpose: Native Language for the version history repository entry record.

modif_flags.purpose: Permission or bit flag value for modif flags on the version history repository entry record.

dbo.vol.summary: Repository volume records for repository volume.
safeReportingNotes: Use repository volume records for read-only Repository metadata reporting.

localid.purpose: Local identifier for the repository volume record.

fixpath.purpose: Fixed storage path for the volume.

rempath.purpose: Remote storage path for the volume.

maxsize.purpose: Maximum configured size for the volume.

cursize.purpose: Current logical size for the volume.

curdisksize.purpose: Current disk size for the volume.

sourcevol.purpose: Sourcevol for the repository volume record.

vol_created.purpose: Timestamp or date value for volume created on the repository volume record.

encryption_key_guid.purpose: Encryption key GUID used by the volume.

full_enc_alg_id.purpose: Full Enc Alg identifier for the repository volume record.

cksum_alg.purpose: Checksum Alg for the repository volume record.

dbo.vol_unavailable.summary: Repository volume records for unavailable volume row.
safeReportingNotes: Use unavailable volume row records for read-only Repository metadata reporting.

last_check.purpose: Timestamp or date value for last check on the unavailable volume row record.

dbo.volacl.summary: Access control records for volume ACL entry.
safeReportingNotes: Use volume ACL entry records for read-only security and access reporting.

mask.purpose: Permission mask assigned by the ACL entry.

sid.purpose: Security identifier for the trustee, user, group, or account.

dbo.watermarks.summary: Repository metadata records for trustee watermark setting.
safeReportingNotes: Use trustee watermark setting records for read-only Repository metadata reporting.

sid.purpose: Security identifier for the trustee, user, group, or account.

watermark.purpose: Watermark stored for the trustee watermark setting record; review contents before reporting.

dbo.wopi_at.summary: Security-sensitive integration or credential records for WOPI access token.
safeReportingNotes: Use WOPI access token records for read-only diagnostics only, and avoid exposing credentials, tokens, keys, or security-sensitive values.

access_token.purpose: WOPI access token value; do not expose or use for reporting.

ttl.purpose: Numeric value for time to live on the WOPI access token record.

sid.purpose: Security identifier for the trustee, user, group, or account.

perms.purpose: Permission or bit flag value for perms on the WOPI access token record.

dbo.wopi_lock.summary: Security-sensitive integration or credential records for WOPI lock.
safeReportingNotes: Use WOPI lock records for read-only diagnostics only, and avoid exposing credentials, tokens, keys, or security-sensitive values.

lock_id.purpose: Lock identifier for the WOPI lock record.

expires.purpose: Timestamp or date value for expires on the WOPI lock record.

dbo.wopi_user_info.summary: Trustee, account, or authentication records for WOPI user information row.
safeReportingNotes: Use WOPI user information row records for read-only diagnostics only, and avoid exposing credentials, tokens, keys, or security-sensitive values.

sid.purpose: Security identifier for the trustee, user, group, or account.

user_info.purpose: User Info for the WOPI user information row record.
